agents.name: Bookkeeping
agents.description: Your full-stack AI bookkeeper for early-stage startups. One agent covering setup, daily transactions, monthly close, investor-ready reporting, and tax/audit handoff. No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, Google Sheets for live P&Ls, drafts only (I never post to your GL, move money, or file anything).
agents.author: Houston

agents.name: Engineering
agents.description: Your full-stack AI engineering operator for solo founders. One agent that covers planning, triage, development quality, reliability, and docs  -  roadmap, sprint planning, PR reviews, design docs, incident response, runbooks, release notes, API docs. No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never merge, deploy, or auto-commit).
agents.author: Houston

agents.name: Legal
agents.description: Your full-stack AI Legal operator for solo founders at week 0  -  Delaware C-corp, Stripe, Google Workspace, no retained law firm. One agent that covers contracts, compliance (privacy / subprocessors / DSR), entity (Delaware franchise tax, board consent, 409A, 83(b)), IP (trademark knockout), and advisory (do-I-need-X memos, escalation briefs for real counsel). No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Drafts only  -  I never file, sign, send, or post.
agents.author: Houston

No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never publish).
agents.author: Houston

agents.name: Operations
agents.description: Your full-stack AI operations operator for solo founders. One agent covering planning, scheduling, finance hygiene, vendors, and data. No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never send, close, or commit).

agents.name: People
agents.description: Your full-stack AI people / HR operator for solo founders. One agent that covers hiring, onboarding, performance, compliance, and culture  -  behind one conversation, one context doc, one markdown output folder. No upfront onboarding. Drafts only  -  I never send, schedule, or publish.

agents.name: Sales
agents.description: Your full-stack AI sales operator for solo founders. One agent that covers playbook & strategy, outbound prospecting, inbound triage, meeting prep & deal work, CRM hygiene & forecasting, and retention & expansion. No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never send or commit deal-stage changes without your nod).
agents.author: Houston

agents.name: Support
agents.description: Your full-stack AI customer-support operator for solo founders. One agent covering inbox triage, drafted replies, help-center articles, customer success (onboarding / renewals / expansion / churn-save), and quality (voice / routing / playbooks / review). No upfront onboarding  -  I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never send).
